summary: None of the provided keyframes show a clearly identifiable red object below the windows.

payload.answer: I can’t determine it from the provided frames—no clearly visible red object appears below the windows.
supporting_claims: In frame 0 (the only view with windows), below the windows there is a wall vent/heater and a wall cabinet, but nothing red is visible.

uncertainties: In the window view (frame 0), the area below the windows shows a wall vent/heater and a wall cabinet, but no red object is visible.
Other frames show a refrigerator and a kitchen counter; neither contains windows with a red object below them.

evidence_items.claim: Below the windows, a wall vent/heater and a wall cabinet are visible, but no red object can be seen.
